name: chatrevenue
description: ChatRevenue skills bundle for sales reps. Three skills: chatrevenue-memory (queries the local screen-memory store), chatrevenue-help-with-current-activity (watcher-fired incident handoff), chatrevenue-icp-lead-gen (standalone ICP lead-generation assistant). The first two require the ChatRevenue Monitor desktop app running locally so its MCP server is registered with Cowork; chatrevenue-icp-lead-gen works on its own.
